title: Ordering at a Restaurant
scene: 你在一家美式餐厅用餐，服务员来点餐。

turns.en: Good evening! Welcome. How many in your party?

turns.cn: 两位，靠窗的位置可以吗？
turns.en: Two, please. Could we get a table by the window?

turns.cn: 当然，请跟我来。这是菜单。
turns.en: Of course. Right this way. Here are your menus.
Are you ready to order?

turns.cn: 我要牛排，五分熟，配薯条。
turns.en: I'll have the steak, medium rare, with French fries.
And what would you like to drink?
Just a glass of ice water, please.
Great. I'll put that order in right away.

title: Food Allergy
scene: 你对花生过敏，点餐时需要说明。

turns.cn: 请问，这道菜里有花生吗？
turns.en: Excuse me, does this dish contain peanuts?
Let me check that for you.
The dressing does contain peanuts.

turns.cn: 我对花生严重过敏，有别的推荐吗？
turns.en: I'm severely allergic to peanuts. Do you have any recommendations?

turns.cn: 烤鸡配蔬菜不含坚果，很安全。
turns.en: The grilled chicken with vegetables is nut-free. It's a safe choice.
Perfect, I'll have that.

turns.cn: 我会在订单上注明过敏信息。
turns.en: I'll make a note about the allergy on your order.
Thank you so much!
Could we have the check, please?
That'll be forty-two fifty.
Can we split the bill?
Sure. How would you like to split it?
We'll each pay for our own.
Okay. Will that be card or cash?
Card, please. The service was excellent!
Thank you for coming. Have a wonderful evening!
Hi, what can I get for you?

turns.cn: 一个巨无霸套餐，可乐换成雪碧。
turns.en: A Big Mac combo, and swap the Coke for Sprite.
Large fries or medium?
Large fries, and add an order of chicken nuggets.
For here or to go?
To go, please.
That'll be twelve forty. It'll be right out.

title: Making a Reservation
scene: 你打电话预订餐厅座位。

turns.cn: 您好，意大利餐厅，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Hello, Italian Bistro. How may I help you?

turns.cn: 我想订今晚七点的位子，四个人。
turns.en: I'd like to make a reservation for four at seven tonight.
May I have your name, please?
Zhang Wei. Could we get a table by the window?

turns.cn: 我尽量安排，有特殊要求吗？
turns.en: I'll do my best. Any special requests?
One of us is vegetarian, thank you.

turns.cn: 好的，今晚七点，四位，张先生。
turns.en: Perfect. Seven o'clock, party of four, Mr. Zhang.

title: Wrong Order
scene: 服务员端上的菜不是你点的，你需要礼貌说明。

turns.cn: 不好意思，这好像不是我点的。
turns.en: Excuse me, I don't think this is what I ordered.
I'm so sorry. What did you order?

turns.cn: 我要的是烤鸡，不是这份鱼。
turns.en: I ordered the grilled chicken, not this fish dish.
I'll get that fixed right away. One moment, please.

turns.cn: 没关系，不过请确认一下没有花生。
turns.en: That's fine, but please make sure there are no peanuts.

turns.cn: 会在厨房注明，送一杯饮料致歉。
turns.en: I'll note that in the kitchen. We'll bring a complimentary drink.
Thank you. I appreciate it.
